author: de5tiiny
description: OK, this is my side of the story. I attended the 2025 graduation at UC Berkeley and I was aware that they would be a protest, but I didn’t think it would be right in front of me. so basically these group of graduates walked in and sat down, got ready and everything everything looked normal. As soon as the ceremony started, they started putting on their red glove to represent bloody hands and lifted it up in the air they also had their white shirt on. I couldn’t read the writings or what it said because of where I was standing. I bet you as soon as they did that, I noticed extra security being posted right in front of them. I was honestly scared something might go down, but I loved how the students handled the situation peacefully. When a speech was being given by the keynote speaker i’ve forgot his name, they all got up so they could be seen properly and that when three security in gray shirts walked up the stands to tell them they have to either sit down or they had to leave. I’m not sure what the security exactly said, but when they told them something, the students started walking out Chanting and people were cheering for them. I don’t know what happened after They left, but I heard some of the kids came back.  #ucb#ucberkeleyl#californiae#freegazao#protest
